calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Debrah Daniloff, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525
Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Calrence Williams appears in pro per. Respondent Agustin Garcia appears in pro per and spanish court interpreter Shannon Raintree. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Daniloff.

EXHR (A) summary of lost (shown photos of damage house in Ipad)
EXHA (1) police report

9:40am
ten minutes recess for respondent, Agustin Garcia to review the police report.

9:50am
matters resume; all parties present

10:00am
copies of evidence is retained;original returned. matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Judgment Entered
